The inventory delta remained 0 and there is no evidence of any logs (or planks/sticks) being collected.

However, there is no verifier evidence here that the remember payload contained either (A) an exact reachable wood/log candidate with exact Minecraft wood/log name plus integer coordinates, or (B) a properly scoped bounded absence statement tied to the specific observe context. The runtime verifier is therefore not applicable for the cycle’s strict success criteria.
